basic_details.job_title: IGNTU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Research Assistant, Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University (IGNTU) Research Assistant / Field Investigator Notification 2026 has been released on 20 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the IGNTU Research Assistant / Field Investigator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Research Assistant / Field Investigator: Master Degree with at least 55 percent marks in Sociology/Anthropology/Social Work/Tribal Studies/Political Science/History/Ancient Indian History Culture and Archeology/Psychology/Economics. 5% relaxation for SC/ST. Desirable: Experience in projects/research with knowledge of SPSS.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IGNTU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IGNTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IGNTU Research Assistant / Field Investigator posts is 10 May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree with at least 55% marks in specified subjects like Sociology, Anthropology, Social Work, Tribal Studies, Political Science, History, Ancient Indian History Culture and Archeology, Psychology, or Economics. A 5% relaxation is provided for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 12 vacancies are available for the posts of Research Assistant and Field Investigator in Indira Gandhi National Tribal University.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant / Field Investigator positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for IGNTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IGNTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Indira Gandhi National Tribal University located?
faq.answer: Indira Gandhi National Tribal University (IGNTU) is located in Amarkantak, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any desirable qualifications for the posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with experience in projects or research, and knowledge of SPSS, are considered desirable for these positions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IGNTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
